problems.diagnostic: Ardupilot_Software (identifier) is not a package or a property set visible or existing
problems.cause: Reference to non-existent package in property value
problems.minimal_edit: Remove or replace reference to Ardupilot_Software in property value

executor_steps: Locate the property Initialize_Entrypoint in thr_mgmt
Replace classifier (Ardupilot_Software::spg_flt_mgmt_init) with a valid identifier or remove the property if not applicable
Ensure all referenced identifiers are visible in the current AADL model
